ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size */,
  "uk_aus_size" TEXT /* UK/AUS size */,
  "fr_size" TEXT /* French size */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Italian size */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size */,
  "chn_size" TEXT /* Chinese size */,
  "jpn_size" TEXT /* Japanese size */,
  "size_chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the size chart */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size, including measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "category_features" TEXT /* Features or benefits of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabrics" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fabric */,
  "fabric_properties" TEXT /* Properties of the fabric */,
  "fabric_care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the fabric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "style_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the style */,
  "style_occasions" TEXT /* Occasions when the style is appropriate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric used in the product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Features or benefits of the product */,
  "product_stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse or store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "customer_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer size record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size that fits the customer */,
  "measurement_bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "measurement_waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "measurement_hips" REAL /* Hips measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is being shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the size recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)
